title: 2017 AFN Convention Safety Message from the AFN Board and Convention Committee
summary: Dear AFN Delegates and Convention Participants: As you prepare to attend the 51st annual AFN Convention, the AFN Board of Directors Convention Committee would like you to be aware of several security-related developments.
